leadText: The Shalour Sable (Japanese: シャラサブレ Shala Sable) is a type of medicine introduced in Generation VI. It is a local specialty of Shalour City and cures a Pokémon from all non-volatile status conditions and confusion.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] When used from the Bag on a Pokémon, it cures a Pokémon of all non-volatile status conditions ( poison , paralysis , sleep , burn , freeze ) and confusion .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description X Y OR AS S M US UM Sw Sh BD SP LA Shalour City's famous shortbread. It can be used once to heal all the status conditions of a Pokémon. P E The Kalos region's famous shortbread. It can be used to heal all the status conditions of a single Pokémon. S V Shalour City’s famous shortbread. It can be used to cure any status condition a Pokémon may have.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Although Shalour Sables are not obtainable in Pokémon X and Y without trading , they are mentioned by a female Tourist standing near the Galette Stand in Lumiose City . The Shalour Sable is the only local specialty not obtainable in its home region in the games.
